mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch.worker_report_outbox ( tenant_id, task_id, partition_invocation_id, trace_id, payload_json, publish_status, attempt_count, next_attempt_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{p.tenantId}, #{p.taskId}, #{p.partitionInvocationId}, #{p.traceId}, CAST(#{p.payloadJson} AS jsonb), #{p.publishStatus}, 0, #{p.nextAttemptAt}, #{p.createdAt}, #{p.updatedAt}) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, task_id) DO UPDATE SET partition_invocation_id = EXCLUDED.partition_invocation_id, trace_id = EXCLUDED.trace_id, payload_json = EXCLUDED.payload_json, publish_status = EXCLUDED.publish_status, attempt_count = 0, next_attempt_at = EXCLUDED.next_attempt_at, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT attempt_count FROM batch.worker_report_outbox WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
SELECT count(*) FROM batch.worker_report_outbox WHERE publish_status = #{publishStatus}
SELECT count(*) FROM batch.worker_report_outbox WHERE publish_status = #{statusPublishing} AND updated_at < #{cutoff}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM batch.worker_report_outbox WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
